author: nero_eth
content:
Quick [summary](https://discord.com/channels/595666850260713488/1483120457245790412) from ACDT breakout yesterday, and the followed [snap v2](https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-8189.md) discussion that happened under [this thread](https://discord.com/channels/595666850260713488/1483120457245790412):
Regarding the topics of "reusing the snap v2 message ids vs having new ones (0x08 and 0x09), we went for the new ones, [see PR here](https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11418).
And regarding the roll-out of snap v2: it would be good if we have a simultaneous roll-out but it's not strictly necessary (more details in the above thread). We can then revisit the topic in a month and see where we're at.

author: zsfelfoldi
content: Wait, if I don't create a github issue for the event, is a zoom call still created? Sorry, I did not intend to make anyone wait in an empty call 🙂 it's just that I am still working out some missing details and did not have a whole lot to present so I did not announce the next breakout session yet. Anyways, I hope I'll soon have enough new material and also I'll officially propose the new design for Hegota so I think it will make sense to resume the regular breakout calls soon. In the meantime if you or anyone has questions about 7745B then ping me and we can schedule a call to discuss it.
